myths.title: Check the advice you were given
myths.subtitle: Heard something from a relative? Get a calm, evidence-based answer.
myths.placeholder: e.g. My mother-in-law says I should...
myths.upgradeTitle: You've used your 3 free checks this week
myths.upgradeBody: Preset examples stay free forever. Upgrade for unlimited free-text checks.
myths.commonLabel: Common ones — tap for an instant answer
myths.disclaimer: Dr. Bloom offers general guidance, not a diagnosis. For anything about your child's health, your pediatrician is the right person to ask.

sweetspot.caption: General guidance from age-based wake windows, not medical advice.
sweetspot.prompt: When did she last wake up?

quicklog.title: Quick log
quicklog.example: e.g. "fed 10 minutes left side, then slept two hours"
quicklog.voiceCap: You've used your 5 free voice logs this week. Type it or upgrade.
quicklog.parseError: Could not understand that. Please try again or type it.
quicklog.nothingHeard: Nothing to log yet. Try again or add it manually.
quicklog.micDenied: Microphone blocked. Allow it, or type instead.
quicklog.netError: Voice needs a connection. Type it instead.
quicklog.confirmSub: Edit anything before saving. Nothing is saved until you tap Save.
quicklog.saveError: Could not save. Check your connection.
